mapper.select: SELECT whitelist_id AS whitelistId, whitelist_type AS whitelistType, whitelist_value AS whitelistValue, whitelist_desc AS whitelistDesc, status, is_del AS isDel, creator_id AS creatorId, creator_name AS creatorName, c_time AS cTime, u_time AS uTime FROM sys_user_whitelist WHERE whitelist_id = #{whitelistId} AND is_del = 0

SELECT whitelist_id AS whitelistId, whitelist_type AS whitelistType, whitelist_value AS whitelistValue, whitelist_desc AS whitelistDesc, status, is_del AS isDel, creator_id AS creatorId, creator_name AS creatorName, c_time AS cTime, u_time AS uTime FROM sys_user_whitelist WHERE whitelist_type = #{whitelistType} AND whitelist_value = #{whitelistValue} AND is_del = 0
